parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Primitive Type
parameters.description: Select from the following types. For information on the different types, see the category articles. Depending on the primitive type chosen, some options may not apply.	Using the ' ' primitive type is

parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: This option is used to select the type of surface, when using a .

parameters.name: orientbounds
parameters.label: Orient Bounds
parameters.description: Available only when an input is connected to the Sphere to set bounds for the sphere. When Orient Bounds = On it will rotate the geometry to match the orientation of the input used for bounds.

parameters.name: modifybounds
parameters.label: Modify Bounds
parameters.description: Available only when an input is connected to the Sphere to set bounds for the sphere. When Modify Bounds = On the transform parameters below will further modify the rotation, position, and radius of t

parameters.name: rord
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order in which the rotations are applied.

parameters.name: reverseanchors
parameters.label: Reverse Anchors
parameters.description: Invert the direction of anchors.

parameters.name: anchoru
parameters.label: Anchor U
parameters.description: Set the point in X about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: anchorv
parameters.label: Anchor V
parameters.description: Set the point in Y about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: anchorw
parameters.label: Anchor W
parameters.description: Set the point in Z about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: orient
parameters.label: Orientation
parameters.description: Determines axis for sphere. Poles of sphere align with orientation axis.

parameters.name: freq
parameters.label: Frequency
parameters.description: This controls the level of polygons used to create the sphere, when using the .

parameters.name: rows
parameters.label: Rows
parameters.description: Number of rows in a sphere when using the mesh, imperfect NURBS and imperfect Bzier.

parameters.name: cols
parameters.label: Columns
parameters.description: Number of columns in a sphere when using the mesh, imperfect NURBS and imperfect Bzier.

parameters.name: orderu
parameters.label: U Order
parameters.description: If a spline curve is selected, it is built at this order for U.

parameters.name: orderv
parameters.label: V Order
parameters.description: If a spline curve is selected, it is built at this order for V.

parameters.name: imperfect
parameters.label: Imperfect
parameters.description: This option applies only to Bzier and NURBS spheres. If selected, the spheres are approximated nonrational curves, otherwise they are perfect rational curves.

parameters.name: upole
parameters.label: Unique Points per Pole
parameters.description: Applies to Mesh, NURBS and Bzier surfaces only. This option determines whether points at the poles are shared or are individual to the columns.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: Adds UV texture coordinates to the sphere.

parameters.name: normals
parameters.label: Compute Normals
parameters.description: Creates normals on the geometry.

parameters.name: tz
parameters.label: Tz
parameters.description: Offset of sphere center from object center.

parameters.name: rz
parameters.label: Rz
parameters.description: These three fields rotate the Sphere along the X, Y, and Z axes.

parameters.name: radz
parameters.label: Radz
parameters.description: The radius of the sphere in X, Y and Z.

examples.label: Create a high-poly sphere
examples.description: Increase polygon count for smoother shading.

examples.label: Animate radius with noise
examples.description: Use as expression on radius for organic pulsing.
